recent_projects.name: PBQA
recent_projects.summary: Pattern Based Question and Answer (PBQA) is a Python library that provides tools for querying LLMs and managing text embeddings. It combines guided generation with multi-shot prompting to improve response quality and consistency.
recent_projects.author: Bart Haagsma

recent_projects.name: omniopt2
recent_projects.summary: Automatic highly parallelized hyperparameter optimizer based on Ax/Botorch
recent_projects.author: Norman Koch

recent_projects.name: gegd
recent_projects.summary: Ensemble-based global search algorithm for freeform topology optimization.
recent_projects.author: Seokhwan Min
